title: Bestway 55029 Paddling Fill N Kids Garden Pool with Fun Fish Print, Multicolor, 1.52 m x 25 cm
features: KIDS PADDLING POOL: Provides endless entertainment and play! Children can learn about different sea creatures and their characteristics due to the pool's design. It will engage them in imaginative play
DURABLE MATERIAL: The kids' paddling pool is made from strong and sturdy, pre-tested rigid duty side wall for heavy duty for long-term use, ensuring your kids can create endless summer memories!
EASY SETUP: The paddling pool can be set up and stored in no time! Simply release the pool water with the easy-to-use drain valve
COMFORTABLE: The kids' paddling pool features a soft and comfortable design, providing your little ones with a snug and secure space to build confidence in swimming
COMPLETE SET: Includes 1 pool and a repair patch for longer-lasting use. Water capacity is 435L, and the assembled size is 1.52m x 25cm
description: Product Description Rigid heavy-duty PVC sidewall permanently attached sturdy vinyl bottom Fun see-through portholes Water capacity: 435 L (115 gal.) Contents: one pool, repair patch Safety Warning Warning. Only for domestic use.
